site.description: Plan weekly meals together, keep the history and share changes instantly.
breadcrumb.label: Breadcrumb
footer.createdWith: Menu Diario, a lightweight web app to decide what to eat together.
home.title: Write down the daily menu and decide the week together
home.description: Plan breakfasts, lunches and dinners, browse the history, reuse saved dishes and decide together what to eat every day.
home.appDescription: Sign in to edit the weekly menu, create new weeks and share them with more people.
home.loginDescription: If you already have an open session, we will take you straight to your private dashboard. Otherwise, sign in with Google or continue as guest.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.configureDescription: Plan the week, review the upcoming days and use AI whenever you want.
dashboard.configureCardHint: Open the upcoming days and adjust each meal quickly.
dashboard.enabledMeals: What do you want to configure
dashboard.noMeal: I will not plan this meal for this day
dashboard.reasonEatingOut: I am not eating at home
dashboard.reasonNotHungry: I do not feel like eating
dailyOptions.dayDescription: Tick what affects planning for this day.
history.title: History
history.description: Search and edit previous days by date.
history.empty: There are no days in this range.
group.title: Group
group.description: Share the code so other people can join your group.
group.copied: Code copied. Send it to the other person so they can join.
summary.title: Weekly summary
summary.description: Most used dishes, repetitions and gaps to plan.
summary.emptyTopDishes: There are no dishes used in your menus yet.
summary.emptyRepeatedDishes: No dishes are repeated this week.
summary.notEnoughHistory: Once more weeks are saved you will be able to compare trends.
summary.noLatestDish: There are no catalogue dishes yet.
summary.recommendationDefault: Review your weekly planning to balance menus better.
summary.recommendation.emptyWeek: This week has {count} empty meals. You can complete them from configure.
summary.recommendation.repeatedDish: {dish} appears {count} times this week. You can rotate it with another saved dish.
summary.recommendation.staleDish: You have not eaten {dish} for a long time. It may be a good option to bring back.
summary.recommendation.balancedWeek: The week looks fairly balanced. Save new dishes if you want more variety.
dishes.title: My dishes
dishes.future: Duplicate any global dish as your own to customize it.
dishes.globalReadOnly: Global dish managed by administrators. It cannot be edited from this view.
dishes.globalReadOnlyModal: This dish belongs to the shared catalogue. You can review it here and duplicate it as your own if you want to customize the name, blocked state or tags.
dishes.editableHint: Advanced changes are saved from this dialog without leaving the screen.
dishes.empty: There are no saved dishes yet
dishes.emptyHint: Add one manually or save dishes in your menus to see them here.
dishes.permissionsError: You do not have permission to view or change these dishes.
dishes.firebaseMissing: Your dishes cannot be loaded right now. Please try again later.
dishes.archived: Dish archived. Historical menus were not changed.
dishes.duplicated: Global dish duplicated as a group-owned dish.
dishes.duplicate: A group-owned dish with that name already exists.
dishes.duplicateGlobal: A global dish with that name already exists. You can duplicate it as your own to customize it.
dishes.invalid: Enter a valid dish name with at least two characters.
dishes.notEditable: This dish cannot be edited from the normal UI.
dishes.confirmArchiveDescription: This dish will disappear from your active suggestions, but historical menus that use it will stay the same.
adminDishes.title: Manage global dishes
adminDishes.description: Add, import, review and archive dishes in the shared catalogue without leaving the app.
adminDishes.deniedDescription: You need administrator permissions to manage global dishes.
adminDishes.name: Dish name
adminDishes.importDescription: Paste a line-based list, JSON or simple CSV and review it before saving.
adminDishes.previewEmpty: There are no items ready to import yet.
adminDishes.empty: There are no global dishes yet.
adminDishes.emptySearch: There are no global dishes for that filter.
adminDishes.invalid: Review the dish name and import format before saving.
ai.disabled: Smart assistance is not available right now.
ai.error: The AI request could not be completed.
ai.quotaExhausted: You have reached the AI request limit for now.
ai.missingConfig: Smart assistance is not available right now.
ai.appCheckUnavailable: Smart assistance is not available right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
ai.pendingMealsDescription: Generate proposals only for empty upcoming meal slots using visible dishes from the catalog, including both global and own dishes.
ai.pendingMealsHint: The request only sends pending slots, the locale and minimal metadata from visible dishes. It does not include emails or personal notes.
ai.pendingMealsEmpty: There are no pending meals right now.
ai.pendingMealsNoCatalog: Add or recover visible dishes before requesting recommendations.
ai.pendingMealsNoResults: There are no recommendations ready to apply yet.
ai.pendingMealsApplied: Recommendation applied to the pending day.
ai.pendingMealsDishAdded: Recommended dish added to the pending day.
planningAi.title: Quick ideas for your week
planningAi.description: Pick days, choose meals and let AI suggest dishes.
planningAi.formTitle: What do you want to plan
planningAi.formDescription: Adjust the range, meals, ideas and style of the proposal.
planningAi.recommendationHint: More ideas give you variety, fewer ideas are faster to review.
planningAi.modeOwnHint: Reuse only dishes you already have saved.
planningAi.modeNewHint: AI suggests fresh dishes instead of your current catalog.
planningAi.modeMixHint: Mix saved dishes with new ideas when it makes sense.
planningAi.pendingDescription: These are the pending slots inside the selected range.
planningAi.pendingEmpty: There are no pending slots for this configuration.
planningAi.resultsDescription: Tap to add one idea right away or open the full day and fine-tune it.
planningAi.resultsEmpty: There are no proposals to show yet.
planningAi.resultsNotGenerated: Set up the request and find ideas to see proposals here.
planningAi.added: Dish added to the day editor.
planningAi.applied: Selection loaded into the day editor.
planningAi.noOwnDishes: You do not have visible own dishes available for own-dishes-only recommendations.
planningAi.invalidRange: Review the date range before launching the planning request.
planningAi.loadingSlots: Preparing the range and finding pending slots...
planningAi.generated: Plan generated. Review the proposals before saving them.
shopping.title: AI shopping list
shopping.description: Generate the ingredient list from your upcoming meals.
shopping.loginTitle: Plan your shopping from the menu
shopping.loginDescription: Sign in to generate the shopping list from your menus.
shopping.mealsDescription: These meals will be analyzed to generate the list.
shopping.emptyMeals: No meals configured in this range.
shopping.emptyPlannedMeals: Not enough dishes to generate the list.
shopping.inventoryHint: Tuppers and leftovers are used as optional reference.
shopping.rangeDescription: Pick the days you want to cover.
shopping.reviewDescription: Keep only what you need to buy.
shopping.startByGenerating: Generate the list and review here the ingredients you still want to buy.
shopping.draftDescription: Review, edit and mark every ingredient before saving or exporting. Only items marked as buy will be shared.
shopping.regenerateConfirm: The new generation will replace only the current AI proposal. Manual items will be kept.
shopping.copied: Shopping list copied to the clipboard.
shopping.invalidResponse: The shopping proposal did not pass safe validation.
shopping.noToBuyItems: There are no items marked as buy right now.
shopping.previewHint: You can change name, quantity, category and status before saving
shopping.exportEmpty: There is nothing left to buy.
shoppingLists.title: Shopping lists
shoppingLists.description: Review your saved lists, open only the one you need and mark items as bought.
shoppingLists.empty: You do not have saved shopping lists yet. Create one manually or generate one from AI shopping.
shoppingLists.deleteListConfirm: Delete this shopping list? This action cannot be undone.
shoppingLists.createdList: New list ready. Add items and save it.
shoppingLists.selectList: Select a saved list to review it.
menu.configMissing: The app is not available right now. Please try again later.
menu.permissionsError: You do not have permission to change this content.
menu.emptyList: There are no weeks in this section yet.
errors.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to change this content.
errors.unavailable: We could not connect to your data right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: We could not complete this action right now. Please try again.
errors.firebaseMissingConfig: The app is not available right now. Please try again later.
errors.groupNotFound: The shared group or menu could not be found.
errors.inviteNotFound: The invitation could not be found.
errors.appCheckUnavailable: Security verification is not ready yet. Please try again in a moment.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist, has moved or has not been created yet.
